full_text:
**Responsible:** Venla Kaislo (Ziqi Kang)

**Timeline**: 2025.03 \-- 2025.08 (6 months)

**Description:** This project aims to apply survival analysis and
different modeling methods to assess the importance of features derived
from: Clinical labels - e.g., tumor stage, drug combinations; Genomic
data - e.g., copy number variation (CNV) from Whole exome sequencing
(WES) and Spatial data - tumor/stroma ratio, immune infiltration,
recurrence cellular neighborhood from tCyCIF. The result will be
integrated with the
[[12_SPACE]{.underline}](https://drive.google.com/open?id=1PD68Rq4op906-SWc-ulKW6RHN-3k0-Hd)
project.
